subject: 1 Week Left: Top 10 (for Affiliates only)
body:
Mozination -

With only 1 week left until 100M Money Models, here's the top ten affiliate leaderboard.

You have 7 days left to claim a top-ten spot and win.

Here are the current, verified rankings:

Number 1: Chahid Kari - 9,290
Number 2: Enzo Carasso - 3,513
Number 3: Jonathan Montoya - 2,857
Number 4: Nipun Syal - 1,197
Number 5: Arlan Hamilton - 1,179
Number 6: Sahil Sehgal - 1,137
Number 7: Jack Damz - 1,105
Number 8: Austin Armstrong - 1,090
Number 9: Jorge Ramos - 1,050
Number 10: Rodrigo Camacho - 838

Take a look at the names above. This is your current competition.

If you're in the top 100 – you'll be able to see where you stand here.

To be clear, only the top 50 have a locked in spot for the day in Vegas.

Good luck. You guys are incredible. (and super competitive)

Once again, thank you for helping us make real business available to everyone. Thank you all for choosing to help promote the new book.

I know you didn't have to. It's 100% appreciated.

Alex.

PS - For anyone who's struggling to get just 10 people invited (to unlock the 70 Profit Tactics Audiobook + full recording of the affiliate day + chance to win a day out*)...

Here's some tactics to use to help get you there of what others have been doing that's working.

They have:
- Created Youtube videos
- Posted $100M Money Models Memes
- Shared TikToks
- Run Ads
- Sent emails to their list
- Posted in their groups/communities
- Some have sent over plenty of VIP buyers
- One even used their local business as a way to spread the word.

All of the top ten have one thing in common: preparation

It works. It's a guiding principle of the new book
